role: Command-line interface layer for the ArchSpine semantic mirror system, handling user interaction, argument parsing, command routing, and output formatting.
responsibility: Provides the CLI entrypoint, help system, UI utilities, and adapters for all subcommands (build, sync, init, etc.), coordinating with core services to execute user requests and display results.

children.role: CLI UI presentation utility for formatting command output, banner display, configuration value parsing, and text wrapping.
CLI command adapters for the ArchSpine system, each handling a specific subcommand's interface and delegation to core services.
Configuration module defining types, constants, and a dynamic builder function for document language selection in a multilingual documentation system.
CLI help text renderer for the ArchSpine command-line interface.
Primary CLI entrypoint and command router for the ArchSpine semantic mirror system.
Directory containing the initialization and bootstrapping modules for ArchSpine repository and runtime setup.
CLI command adapter for managing repository artifact strategies (check and set) within the ArchSpine system.
